title: Project scaffold, shared types, and config loader
description: Create the Rust project skeleton: Cargo.toml with dependencies (macroquad, noise, serde, toml, rand, serde_json, clap), src/lib.rs with module declarations, src/main.rs with a minimal macroquad game loop placeholder. Implement src/types.rs with all shared enums and structs: Commodity (TIMBER, ORE, GRAIN, FISH, CLAY, HERBS, TOOLS, MEDICINE, BRICKS, METALWORK, PROVISIONS, POTTERY, WEAPONS, FURNITURE, ARMOR, ALCHEMY, MACHINERY, FEAST_GOODS, ELITE_GEAR, AUTOMATON, ELIXIR, LUXURY_SET), Season (SPRING, SUMMER, AUTUMN, WINTER), TerrainType (PLAINS, FOREST, HILLS, MOUNTAINS, WATER, COAST), Profession (TRADER, MINER, FARMER, CRAFTSMAN, SOLDIER, SHIPWRIGHT, IDLE), Side (Buy, Sell), ReputationChannel (PROFIT, DEMAND, DANGER, OPPORTUNITY), AgentState enum, Vec2 wrapper if not using macroquad's, CityId, and MarketAction enum. Implement src/config.rs: define EconomyConfig struct mirroring all TOML sections (world, city, merchant, bandit, reputation, road, professions) with serde Deserialize. Write economy_config.toml with all default values from the spec. Config loader should validate ranges (e.g., tax_rate_range, population_range) and return errors for invalid configs.
result_summary:
All done. Here's what was created:

**`Cargo.toml`** — Dependencies: macroquad, noise, serde, toml, rand, serde_json, clap

**`src/types.rs`** — All shared types:
- `Commodity` (22 variants, Tier 0–3) with `tier()`, `necessity_weight()`, `ALL`/`RAW` constants
- `Season` with `next()`, travel/food/bandit modifiers
- `TerrainType` with `speed_multiplier()`, `is_passable()`, `from_height()`
- `Profession` (7 variants), `Side`, `ReputationChannel`
- `AgentState` (19 FSM states covering all professions)
- `Vec2` with full arithmetic ops, `normalized()`, `distance()`, `from_angle()`, `lerp()`
- `CityId`, `MarketAction`, `MerchantTraits`, `Recipe`, `Order`, `Transaction`, `CityUpgrade`, `TerrainRay`, `NeighborInfo`

**`src/config.rs`** — `EconomyConfig` with sections for world, city, merchant, bandit, reputation, road, professions. Validates:
- Range pairs (`population_range`, `tax_rate_range`, patrol/rob ranges)
- Percentage bounds (tax max <= 1.0, rob pcts in [0,1])
- Positive values (dimensions, capacities, speeds)
- Profession distribution sums to ~1.0
- Collects all errors before returning

**`economy_config.toml`** — All spec defaults verbatim

**`src/lib.rs`** — Module declarations for `types` and `config`

**`src/main.rs`** — Minimal macroquad game loop that loads config and renders FPS + world bounds

`cargo check` and `cargo test` (4 tests) pass cleanly.
